calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-13-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff OM/UDR SF LLC is present. Represented by Ethel Pacis.
Attorney Daniel Riley for the plaintiff.
Defendant Luis Espino is present.
Attorney Taylor Pospichel appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of April 17, 2017 is vacated. (501)
